hero.title: Ingqalasizinda ezimele
hero.lead: Sikholelwa ukuthi ukusebenzisa amamodeli athuthukile, anamandla kumahadiwe osunawo kakade, ezikhungweni ezincane, ezisebenza kahle, kuyindlela amabhizinisi amancane naphakathi ase-Yurophu ancintisana ngayo nomqondo we-hyperscaler obusa umkhakha wezobuchwepheshe womhlaba namuhla.

intent.title: Kungani i-Helexa Ikhona
intent.p1: Ingqalasizinda ye-AI yanamuhla ibuswa ama-datacentre amakhulu (hyperscale) atholakala ngokwendawo emazweni angaphandle kwe-EU, noma alawulwa yizinkampani eziphendula emithethweni yamazwe angaphandle kwe-EU — anezinhloso, izindlela zokusebenza namasu okungahlali kuhlangabezana namazinga aphezulu ase-Yurophu okuziphatha nokuvikelwa kwabathengi. Amabhizinisi ase-Yurophu kufanele ngokwengeziwe acubungule futhi avikele idatha ngaphakathi kohlaka lomthetho lwe-EU — into izinhlelo ze-inference zangaphandle okungavamile ukuthi ziyibeke phambili.
intent.p2Intro: I-Helexa isebenzisa ingqalasizinda i-Yurophu esinayo kakade kanye namamodeli e-open-weight esingakwazi ukumelana nokuwalahlekelwa:
intent.bullet1: Amamodeli athuthukile e-open-weight asebenza kahle kuma-accelerator ajwayelekile, awochwepheshe nawezinga le-datacentre.
intent.bullet2: Ukuhlala kwedatha nobumfihlo njengokuzenzakalelayo. I-inference ihlala engqalasizindeni engaphakathi kwendawo yomthetho yomthengi.
intent.bullet3: Ukusebenzisa amandla ama-accelerator akhona njengamanje ngaphandle kokudela ukusebenza kahle.
intent.closing: Akulona ifu lomhlaba wonke elivele libe ne-datacentre e-EU. Ngabaphathi abaningi be-EU abazimele, abazibusayo.

whyNow.title: Kungani Manje
whyNow.problemBullet1: Izinhlelo ze-inference zanamuhla zicabanga ama-datacentre amakhulu (hyperscale), amaqoqo amakhulu ama-GPU nama-LLM omthombo ovaliwe.
whyNow.problemBullet2: Imithetho yase-Yurophu (i-GDPR, i-AI Act, imithetho yemikhakha) iqondisa imisebenzi endaweni yangaphakathi nasesifundeni.
whyNow.problemBullet3: Ukuthumela idatha emafini angaphandle kuyingozi yomthetho, yobumfihlo neyezindleko.
whyNow.problemBullet4: Ukufinyelela kuma-GPU efu kuyabiza, kunokushoda kokuhlinzekwa, futhi kulawulwa kwenye indawo.
whyNow.problemBullet5: Amahadiwe ajwayelekile nawe-workstation anamandla asevele ekhona kulo lonke elase-Yurophu engasetshenziswa ngokugcwele.
whyNow.opportunityIntro: Amamodeli e-open-weight asondele ezingeni eliphambili manje asebenza kahle kumahadiwe i-Yurophu esinawo kakade.
whyNow.opportunityBullet1: Amamodeli athuthukile e-open-weight asebenza kuma-workstation nakuma-GPU ajwayelekile ngaphandle kwamaqoqo ama-GPU e-datacentre.
whyNow.opportunityBullet2: Amabhizinisi ase-Yurophu afuna i-AI angayisebenzisa endaweni yawo, ngezindleko ezibikezelekayo nokufinyelela okuqinisekisiwe kwesikhathi esizayo.
whyNow.opportunityBullet3: Abaphathi abanamahadiwe anamandla bangahlinzeka nge-inference eduze nabathengi.
whyNow.opportunityBullet4: Imithetho iguqula ukuzimela kwedatha kusuka ekukhetheni kuye esidingweni.
whyNow.opportunityBullet5: Isofthiwe ye-inference esebenza kahle iyisendlalelo esishodayo futhi iyikhambi lama-datacentre amaningi namakhulu ngokwengeziwe.

operators.title: Sebenzisa amamodeli athuthukile kumahadiwe akho.
operators.body: I-Helexa iletha amamodeli e-open-weight asondele ezingeni eliphambili kuma-GPU ajwayelekile nawezinga le-workstation, endaweni yakho, ngaphansi komthetho wakho. Ayikho i-cluster, ayikho i-hyperscaler, akukho ukuncika phesheya. Idatha ihlala lapho uyilawula khona.

routing.title: Izicelo zihlala eduze nekhaya.
routing.body: I-Helexa iqondisa isicelo ngasinye engqalasizindeni enamandla, ikhetha ukusondelana kwesifunda, ukuze ithrafikhi nedatha kuhlale lapho ukulindele khona. Ukufakwa kuhlangana kube inethiwekhi ebanzi njengoba amandla ekhula.

value.title: Umsebenzi uyafakazelwa. Ezomnotho zisobala.
value.body: Ukusetshenziswa kukalwa ngokusobala futhi abaphathi abazimele bazokhokhelwa ngobuhlakani ababuhlinzekayo. Ayikho intela yeplathifomu, akukho ukukhokhiswa okufihlekile, akukho ukuboshelwa.

distributed.title: Ezimele Ngokwakhiwa
distributed.body: Amahadiwe ase-Yurophu, abaphathi base-Yurophu, umthetho wase-Yurophu. Alikho iphuzu elilodwa lokwehluleka futhi ayikho indawo yomthetho yangaphandle ukufinyelela okuncike kuyo.

participation.title: Isebenza Kumahadiwe Onawo
participation.body: Kusukela ku-workstation eyodwa kuye ku-datacentre yesifunda, ikhompyutha enamandla ingasebenzisa i-Helexa. Yehlisa izidingo zengqalasizinda kunokuba ifune amaqoqo amasha.

fairness.title: Ubumfihlo Nokusobala
fairness.body: Ubumfihlo kusukela ekuqaleni: umlando wengxoxo uhlala kusiphequluli kuphela, awulokothi uhlale kuseva. Ukukalwa kokusetshenziswa kusobala; awekho amabhokisi amnyama futhi azikho izimali ezifihliwe.

evolving.title: Eqinile Ngokusabalala
evolving.body: Amandla asabalele kokufakwa okuningi okuzimele kunzima ukuwavimba, ukuwanciphisa noma ukuwacisha, futhi amelana nezinguquko zenqubomgomo yangaphandle nokwehluleka komthengisi oyedwa.

roadAhead.title: Lapho i-Helexa Iya Khona
roadAhead.p1: Umgomo wethu wesikhathi eside uwukuba yisendlalelo sesofthiwe esiqhuba inethiwekhi esabalalisiwe yengqalasizinda ye-AI yase-Yurophu ephethwe ngokuzimela.
roadAhead.p2: Kusukela ekufakweni kwamabhizinisi asebenzisa amamodeli athuthukile kumahadiwe awo, kuye kuma-datacentre ezifunda asebenzisa amandla avuselelekayo akhonza imiphakathi yawo.
roadAhead.p3: Isendlalelo se-inference sase-Yurophu esiphethwe futhi sisetshenzwa e-Yurophu. Simelana nokuphazamiseka, izinguquko zenqubomgomo yangaphandle, ukubusa kwenkampani eyodwa nokwehluleka komthengisi oyedwa.
roadAhead.p4: Ingqalasizinda eqinisa ukuzimela kwe-Yurophu esikhundleni sokujulisa ukuncika kubahlinzeki abambalwa bangaphandle.

card.title: Isendlalelo sesofthiwe sengqalasizinda ye-AI yase-Yurophu
card.body: I-Helexa isesekuqaleni, futhi ngamabomu. Uhlelo lwe-inference olusebenzayo namuhla, olukhula lube inethiwekhi esabalalisiwe yokufakwa kwase-Yurophu okuphethwe ngokuzimela.

joinMesh.title: Ingqalasizinda ye-AI Ezimele.
joinMesh.lead: Noma ngabe usebenzisa i-AI kumahadiwe akho, uphethe amandla okubala, noma wakhela ekuzimeleni kwe-AI yase-Yurophu, kukhona indawo yakho lapha.
joinMesh.footer: Azikho izingadi ezibiyelwe. Isendlalelo sesofthiwe se-AI ezimele yase-Yurophu. Kusukela ku-workstation eyodwa kuye kuma-datacentre ezifunda asebenzisa amandla avuselelekayo.
